title: MyTotem
description: Customize your Totem of Undying with your own image!
body:
![Settings screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dfcf95a55e38687e04e6989ab7132cdcd99aea6.jpeg) # MyTotem **MyTotem** is a client-side Fabric mod that lets you customize the **Totem of Undying** with your **own image.** Instead of manually creating a resource pack, MyTotem automatically generates and applies one from the image you choose in-game. It is useful for players who want a custom totem without manually editing textures or building a resource pack. ## Features * Customize the Totem of Undying with your own image * Automatically generate a resource pack from the selected image * Add custom image files in-game * Select saved totem images * Delete registered images * Change the displayed totem name * Simple and clean configuration screen * Client-side only * Supports 23 languages ## How to Use 1. Install `Fabric Loader`. 2. Install `Fabric API`. 3. Install `Mod Menu` for easier access to the config screen. 4. Launch Minecraft. 5. Open the MyTotem configuration screen. 6. Add your custom image. 7. Select the image you want to use. 8. MyTotem will automatically generate and apply the resource pack.
Supported Languages * Arabic * German * English (Canada) * English (US) * Spanish (Spain) * Spanish (Mexico) * Filipino * French * Hindi * Indonesian * Italian * Japanese * Korean * Dutch * Polish * Portuguese (Brazil) * Russian * Swedish * Thai * Turkish * Vietnamese * Chinese (Simplified) * Chinese (Traditional)
## Supported Minecraft Versions * `1.20.1` * `1.21.1` * `26.1.2` ## Requirements * `Fabric Loader` * `Fabric API` * `Mod Menu` recommended ## Notes MyTotem works by automatically creating and applying a resource pack based on the custom image selected in-game. It only changes the visual appearance of the Totem of Undying on the client side. It does not change the vanilla totem behavior, effects, or gameplay mechanics. ## License All Rights Reserved / No License
